Speakers.Speaker: Student by the Paper Sliding Door
Student by the Entrance

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 510}How come our school trip is in Japan? Dude, we've gotta go abroad or there's no point![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 511}Every other teacher wanted to go out of the country, but Ekoda insisted on Kyoto.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 511}Man, the hot spring is huge! It felt so good that I swam around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 510}Dude, just because it's big doesn't mean you should swim in it.[n]{f 1 1}
